aiTools.description: Multi-chain gas fee query and comparison tool. Get real-time gas prices for Ethereum and Base, with USD conversion and optimal chain recommendation. Use when the user asks about gas fees, transaction costs, or which chain is cheaper.

actions.name: getAllGasPrices
actions.description: Get gas prices for all chains (Ethereum, Base) at once, including USD conversion. Use when the user asks about overall gas fees or all chain fees.

actions.name: getChainGas
actions.description: Get gas price for a specific chain. Use when the user asks about Ethereum gas or Base fees.

actions.name: compareGas
actions.description: Compare gas fees between Ethereum and Base for a specific operation. Use when the user asks which chain is cheaper or wants a fee comparison.

actions.name: recommendChain
actions.description: Recommend the optimal chain considering transaction amount and operation type. Use when the user asks for a recommendation or which chain is better.
